parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "task_id": {{ $json.original_task?.id || 'null' }},

  "pricing_gap": {{ JSON.stringify($json.pricing_gap) }},
  "feature_insights": {{ JSON.stringify($json.feature_insights) }},
  "confidence_score": {{ $json.confidence_score }},
  "confidence_rationale": {{ JSON.stringify($json.confidence_rationale) }},
  "opportunity_score": {{ $json.opportunity_score }},
  "evidence_links": {{ JSON.stringify($json.evidence_links) }},
  "data_summary": {{ JSON.stringify($json.data_summary) }},
  "status": "approved",
  "processed_at": {{ JSON.stringify($json.processed_at) }}
}
